Description: SQL Injection risk — conflict-detector.ts uses string interpolation (e.g. WHERE id IN (${ids.join(',')})) instead of parameterized queries
Remarks: Verified: parameterized ? placeholders + SAFE_COLUMNS whitelist in conflict-detector.ts L342-348
How to Retest: Grep conflict-detector.ts for template literal SQL. Verify all dynamic values use parameterized queries with ? placeholders.

Description: SQL Injection risk — schedule-entry-service.ts dynamically builds SET clauses using template literals from user-provided field names
Remarks: Verified: parameterized queries throughout schedule-entry-service.ts; no string interpolation in SQL
How to Retest: Review schedule-entry-service.ts update method. Verify all SET clause values use parameterized binding.

Description: No password complexity validation — auth-service.ts only checks non-empty string for passwords
Remarks: Verified: validatePasswordComplexity() in auth-service.ts L71-87 enforces min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number
How to Retest: Attempt to create an account or change password with weak values like '1' or 'a'. Verify rejection.

Description: Backup restore accepts any file without validation — backup-service.ts does not verify the file is a valid SQLite database or has correct schema
Remarks: Verified: validateSqliteFile() + verifyIntegrity() in backup-service.ts L46-65
How to Retest: Attempt to restore a non-SQLite file (e.g. a .txt file). Verify the app rejects it with a clear error.

Description: Export handlers build HTML with string concatenation — user data not HTML-escaped in export-handlers.ts creating stored XSS risk
Remarks: Verified: exports use ExcelJS for Excel output and toCsv() with proper escaping in export-handlers.ts L13-26
How to Retest: Create a room with name containing <script>alert(1)</script>. Export schedule to HTML. Open in browser and check for script execution.

Description: Logo upload has path traversal risk — logo-handlers.ts doesn't sanitize filename for path traversal characters
Remarks: Verified: detectImageType() uses magic bytes, saves with fixed filename institution-logo.{ext} in logo-handlers.ts L65
How to Retest: Test uploading a file with path traversal characters in the filename. Verify the file is written only to the intended directory.

Description: Export handlers allow arbitrary file path writes — export-handlers.ts writes to user-provided path without safety validation
Remarks: Verified: uses dialog.showSaveDialog() for all exports — user controls the path via native dialog
How to Retest: Review export-handlers.ts file write logic. Verify path is restricted to user-selected directories via dialog.

Description: Setup page can be re-accessed after initial setup — routing doesn't adequately prevent re-access to SetupPage.tsx
Remarks: Verified: hasAdminPassword() check in setup-handlers.ts L40-41 blocks re-access; App.tsx needsSetup guard
How to Retest: Complete initial setup. Navigate directly to /setup route. Verify the page is blocked or redirects.

Description: Settings update allows writing to ANY key including admin_password_hash — settings-handlers.ts has no key whitelist
Remarks: Verified: BLOCKED_WRITE_KEYS + ALLOWED_UPDATE_KEYS whitelist in settings-handlers.ts L11-25
How to Retest: Call settings:update IPC with key='admin_password_hash'. Verify it is rejected or blocked.

Description: Preload API exposes generic invoke function for ALL IPC channels — api.ts violates principle of least privilege
Remarks: Verified: safeInvoke() with allowedChannels whitelist in preload/index.ts L12-22
How to Retest: Review preload api.ts. Verify channels are individually exposed rather than a generic invoke.

Description: Missing auth middleware on sensitive operations — setup, backup, and some settings handlers bypass auth in registry.ts
Remarks: Verified: checkAuth() applied to all non-exempt channels via registry.ts L44-46
How to Retest: Call backup:restore and setup IPC channels without a valid auth token. Verify they are rejected.

Description: No login rate limiting — no brute-force protection on auth login attempts
Remarks: Verified: MAX_ATTEMPTS=5 with escalating lockout in auth-service.ts L26-55; UI countdown in LoginPage.tsx L13-32
How to Retest: Attempt 20+ rapid login attempts with wrong password. Verify lockout or rate limiting engages.

Description: Dialog handlers expose raw Electron dialog API without sanitization — dialog-handlers.ts allows renderer to control all dialog options
Remarks: Verified: sanitizeOptions() + BLOCKED_PROPERTIES in dialog-handlers.ts L12-32
How to Retest: Review dialog-handlers.ts. Verify options are whitelisted rather than passed through directly.

Description: AuthContext has no token expiry handling — AuthContext.tsx stores token with no expiration or refresh mechanism
Remarks: Verified: uses in-memory flag (not token) — session clears on close, no persistent token to expire
How to Retest: Let app sit idle for extended period. Attempt an action. Verify proper redirect to login on expired token.

Description: No logout on app/window close — AuthContext.tsx doesn't clean up session on close
Remarks: Verified: clearSession() called in window-all-closed handler in index.ts L176
How to Retest: Close the app without logging out. Reopen. Verify user must re-authenticate.

Description: Missing error handling in database connection — connection.ts has no try-catch around new Database() call
Remarks: Verified: try-catch around new Database() in connection.ts L45-54
How to Retest: Corrupt the SQLite file or make it read-only. Launch app. Verify graceful error message instead of crash.

Description: No global error handler — main index.ts missing process.on('uncaughtException') and process.on('unhandledRejection')
Remarks: Verified: process.on('uncaughtException') and process.on('unhandledRejection') in index.ts L15-31
How to Retest: Trigger an unhandled promise rejection in main process. Verify it is caught and logged rather than crashing.

Description: Cascade deletes cause mass data loss — 001_initial_schema.sql uses ON DELETE CASCADE on semesters → schedule_entries and calendar_events
Remarks: Verified: uses soft-delete (archived_at) pattern via migration 002; delete confirmations show cascade warnings in UI
How to Retest: Delete a semester that has schedule entries. Verify entries are deleted. This should warn the user first.

Description: Missing unique constraints — personnel table has no unique constraint on employee_id, rooms table has no unique on room_name per department
Remarks: Verified: DUPLICATE_EMPLOYEE_ID, DUPLICATE_ROOM_CODE, DUPLICATE_SECTION_CODE enforced in respective service files
How to Retest: Create two personnel with the same employee_id. Verify duplicates are prevented.

Description: Conflict detector doesn't handle overnight schedules — time overlap detection fails for schedules crossing midnight (e.g. 23:00-01:00)
Remarks: Open: timesOverlap() in conflict-detector.ts does not handle midnight-crossing intervals
How to Retest: Create a schedule entry from 23:00 to 01:00. Create another from 00:00 to 02:00 in the same room. Verify conflict is detected.

Description: Recurrence expander has no upper limit — recurrence-expander.ts can generate thousands of entries with no max iteration cap
Remarks: Verified: MAX_RECURRENCE_OCCURRENCES = 200 in recurrence-expander.ts L94 and schedule-entry-service.ts L116-118
How to Retest: Create a daily recurring event spanning 10 years. Verify the app sets a reasonable upper limit.

Description: Publish service lacks concurrency control — publish-service.ts has no locking; double-click can create duplicate published records
Remarks: Verified: frontend uses isSubmitting state to disable publish button during async operation; backend uses db.transaction() for atomicity
How to Retest: Rapidly click the publish button twice. Verify only one publish operation completes.

Description: Calendar event service missing date validation — calendar-event-service.ts doesn't validate end_date > start_date
Remarks: Verified: startDate > endDate check in calendar-event-service.ts L83-85
How to Retest: Create a calendar event where end_date is before start_date. Verify rejection with error message.

Description: Academic year service allows overlapping years — academic-year-service.ts has no overlap check for date ranges
Remarks: Verified: overlap detection query in academic-year-service.ts L62-70
How to Retest: Create two academic years with overlapping date ranges. Verify the second is rejected.

Description: Settings service uses JSON.parse without try-catch — settings-service.ts can throw unhandled exception on corrupted JSON values
Remarks: Verified: settings service stores plain strings, no JSON.parse used on setting values
How to Retest: Manually edit a JSON setting value to invalid JSON in the DB. Load settings. Verify graceful error.

Description: Active term service missing existence validation — active-term-service.ts doesn't verify semester ID exists before setting as active
Remarks: Open: active-term-service.ts returns null when semester not found but does not throw explicit validation error
How to Retest: Call setActiveTerm with a non-existent semester ID. Verify the app rejects it.

Description: Schedule entry service missing time format validation — schedule-entry-service.ts doesn't validate HH:MM format or start < end
Remarks: Verified: start_time >= end_time check + midnight spanning check in schedule-entry-service.ts L377-386
How to Retest: Create a schedule entry with start_time '25:99' or start_time after end_time. Verify rejection.

Description: Template service doesn't validate JSON structure — template-service.ts stores schedule data as JSON without schema validation
Remarks: Open: template-service.ts applyTemplate() copies entries without validating resolved references exist
How to Retest: Manually corrupt a template's JSON data in DB. Apply the template. Verify graceful error handling.

Description: Room service allows negative/zero capacity — room-service.ts doesn't validate capacity is a positive integer
Remarks: Verified: capacity < 1 and capacity > 10000 checks in room-service.ts L91-96; client-side validation in RoomsPage.tsx L33-36
How to Retest: Create a room with capacity 0 or -1. Verify rejection.

Description: Semester service missing term order validation — semester-service.ts allows duplicate order values within same academic year
Remarks: Verified: DUPLICATE_SEMESTER_TYPE check in semester-service.ts L43-48
How to Retest: Create two semesters with the same order value in one academic year. Verify prevention.

Description: Section service doesn't validate max_students — section-service.ts allows unreasonable values
Remarks: Open: section-service.ts has no bounds check on student_count
How to Retest: Create a section with max_students=0 or max_students=999999. Verify reasonable bounds enforced.

Description: Backup service uses synchronous file operations — backup-service.ts uses fs.copyFileSync and fs.mkdirSync blocking main thread
Remarks: Verified: uses async copyFile, mkdir, readdir from fs/promises in backup-service.ts L7
How to Retest: Backup a large database file. Verify the UI remains responsive during backup.

Description: Backup service has no integrity verification — no PRAGMA integrity_check after backup copy
Remarks: Verified: verifyIntegrity() runs PRAGMA integrity_check in backup-service.ts L46-57
How to Retest: Create a backup. Verify the backup file is validated (e.g. via PRAGMA integrity_check).

Description: No database connection cleanup on crash — connection.ts has no handling for unexpected process termination leaving WAL inconsistent
Remarks: Verified: closeDatabase() in finally block (connection.ts L86-88); WAL mode handles crash recovery natively
How to Retest: Force-kill the app process. Reopen. Verify database is intact and WAL is recovered.

Description: Import handlers don't use transactions consistently — import-handlers.ts partial import leaves inconsistent data on failure
Remarks: Verified: db.transaction() wraps entire import commit in import-handlers.ts L136-209
How to Retest: Import a CSV with a valid row followed by an invalid row. Verify the valid row is NOT committed (transaction rollback).

Description: Import handlers accept large files without size limits — import-handlers.ts reads entire file into memory with no size check before read
Remarks: Verified: IMPORT_MAX_FILE_SIZE (5MB) check before read in import-handlers.ts L89-92
How to Retest: Attempt to import a 500MB CSV file. Verify a file size limit is enforced before reading.

Description: CSV parser uses naive line.split(',') — import-handlers.ts doesn't handle quoted fields with commas
Remarks: Verified: uses papaparse library in import-handlers.ts L2 and L31 — handles quoted fields correctly
How to Retest: Import a CSV file with commas inside quoted fields. Verify fields are parsed correctly.

Description: Personnel import update is a no-op — import-handlers.ts increments updated counter but performs no UPDATE SQL for existing records
Remarks: Verified: UPDATE personnel SET ... SQL present in import-handlers.ts L155-157
How to Retest: Import a CSV with existing employee_ids and changed data. Verify the data is actually updated in the database.

Description: Sections import creates duplicates unconditionally — import-handlers.ts always INSERTs with no dedup check on section_code
Remarks: Verified: checks section_code + academic_year_id + semester_id before insert in import-handlers.ts L167
How to Retest: Import a sections CSV twice. Verify duplicates are prevented on second import.

Description: Calendar events import also creates duplicates unconditionally — import-handlers.ts has no dedup check
Remarks: Verified: checks title + start_datetime + end_datetime before insert in import-handlers.ts L180
How to Retest: Import a calendar events CSV twice. Verify duplicates are prevented on second import.

Description: Missing IPC handlers for 3 defined channels — ROOMS_GET_SCHEDULE, SECTIONS_GET_SCHEDULE, PERSONNEL_GET_SCHEDULE have no handlers registered
Remarks: Verified: schedule-query-handlers.ts registers all three handlers for ROOMS_GET_SCHEDULE, SECTIONS_GET_SCHEDULE, PERSONNEL_GET_SCHEDULE
How to Retest: Call window.api.getRoomSchedule() from renderer. Verify it returns data instead of hanging/failing.

Description: Delete handlers don't await async service calls — personnel, room, section, calendar event delete handlers return success before operation completes
Remarks: Verified: handler registrations use async and registry awaits results in registry.ts L50
How to Retest: Delete a personnel record. Add console logging to service. Verify the handler awaits the service result.

Description: Logo stored with hardcoded .png extension regardless of actual format — logo-handlers.ts always uses institution-logo.png even for JPG/SVG uploads
Remarks: Verified: detectImageType() uses magic bytes and stores with correct extension in logo-handlers.ts L12-31 and L65
How to Retest: Upload a .jpg logo file. Verify it displays correctly (not corrupted) in the app.

Description: Backup restore handler ignores arguments — backup-handlers.ts handler signature discards any arguments passed from preload API
Remarks: Verified: handler uses dialog to pick file in backup-handlers.ts L8; args correctly ignored by design
How to Retest: Review backup-handlers.ts restore handler. Verify arguments align with preload API contract.

Description: deleteAutoBackup not awaited — backup-handlers.ts calls async delete without await then returns success immediately
Remarks: Verified: handler uses await backupService.deleteAutoBackup() in backup-handlers.ts L22
How to Retest: Delete an auto-backup. Verify the file is actually deleted before success is returned.

Description: Export section schedule uses LIKE pattern that can produce false positive matches — export-handlers.ts matches section IDs within comma-separated string
Remarks: Verified: delimiter-bounded matching used in export-handlers.ts L557-558
How to Retest: Create sections with IDs like 'abc' and 'xabc'. Export. Verify only correct section data is included.

Description: Import CSV header validation is BOM-sensitive — import-handlers.ts doesn't strip BOM from uploaded files
Remarks: Verified: stripBom() function in import-handlers.ts L25-27, called at L95
How to Retest: Export a CSV from Excel (which adds BOM). Import it. Verify headers are recognized correctly.

Description: parseInt without radix in import handler — import-handlers.ts uses parseInt() without base 10 parameter
Remarks: Verified: uses parseInt(value, 10) throughout import-handlers.ts
How to Retest: Import a CSV with capacity value '0x10'. Verify it is parsed as invalid rather than 16.

Description: Export toCsv doesn't handle carriage returns — export-handlers.ts checks for \\n but not \\r or \\r\\n
Remarks: Verified: toCsv() checks for \n and \r and quotes accordingly in export-handlers.ts L17
How to Retest: Create a record with \\r\\n in a text field. Export to CSV. Verify the CSV is properly formatted.

Description: Setup handler runs migrations and settings non-atomically — setup-handlers.ts can leave partially set up state if settings fail after migrations succeed
Remarks: Verified: db.transaction() wraps migrations + settings in setup-handlers.ts L59-77
How to Retest: Simulate a failure in setSettings after migrations. Verify the app can recover or rollback.

Description: Synchronous bcrypt in setup handler blocks main thread — setup-handlers.ts uses bcrypt.hashSync which freezes UI for ~100-200ms
Remarks: Verified: uses await bcrypt.hash() (async) in setup-handlers.ts L55 and auth-service.ts L102/L136
How to Retest: Run setup with a high bcrypt cost. Verify the UI remains responsive (use async bcrypt.hash).

Description: Export handlers use synchronous writeFileSync on main thread — export-handlers.ts blocks UI during large exports
Remarks: Verified: uses async writeFile from fs/promises in export-handlers.ts L5 and L36
How to Retest: Export a large dataset. Verify the UI remains responsive during export.

Description: Dashboard statistics not refreshed on navigation — DashboardPage.tsx fetches stats once on mount only
Remarks: Verified: useEffect([department]) re-fetches all stats on department change in DashboardPage.tsx L32-64; remounts on navigation via React Router
How to Retest: Add personnel from PersonnelPage. Navigate to Dashboard. Verify count is updated.

Description: No React Error Boundary — App.tsx has no error boundary; any unhandled component error crashes entire app to white screen
Remarks: Verified: <ErrorBoundary> wraps entire app in App.tsx L91 with ErrorBoundary.tsx component
How to Retest: Introduce a deliberate error in a child component. Verify an error boundary catches it and shows fallback UI.

Description: No loading/splash screen on app start — App.tsx shows blank/flickering screen during auth check and DB initialization
Remarks: Verified: LoadingSkeleton shown during auth check in App.tsx L39-41
How to Retest: Cold-start the app. Observe if a loading indicator is shown during initialization.

Description: Login page missing form validation — LoginPage.tsx allows empty username/password submission with no inline errors
Remarks: Verified: required attribute on password input + disabled={!password} on submit button in LoginPage.tsx L113/L139
How to Retest: Submit the login form with empty fields. Verify inline validation errors appear.

Description: Login page missing password visibility toggle — LoginPage.tsx has no show/hide toggle for password input
Remarks: Verified: showPassword toggle with eye icon in LoginPage.tsx L116-133
How to Retest: Check the login form for a password visibility toggle icon/button.

Description: Dashboard has no empty state — DashboardPage.tsx shows empty cards when no academic year or semester is active
Remarks: Verified: 'No active term set. Go to Academic Years to set one.' empty state message in DashboardPage.tsx L88
How to Retest: Open dashboard with no data configured. Verify a helpful empty state message is shown.

Description: Schedule page missing loading indicator — SchedulePage.tsx shows blank content during data fetch
Remarks: Verified: loading state with 'Loading...' indicator in SchedulePage.tsx L449
How to Retest: Navigate to schedule page with slow network/DB. Verify a loading spinner or skeleton is shown.

Description: Schedule page no confirmation for delete — SchedulePage.tsx deletes entries immediately on click with no confirmation dialog or undo
Remarks: Verified: confirm() dialog with danger variant in SchedulePage.tsx L185-191
How to Retest: Click delete on a schedule entry. Verify a confirmation dialog appears before deletion.

Description: Schedule page conflict warnings not prominent — SchedulePage.tsx shows conflicts as small text items
Remarks: Verified: color-coded severity badges (red=HARD, amber=SOFT) in table L481-482 and full conflict panel in form L287-295
How to Retest: Create a conflicting schedule. Verify the conflict is prominently displayed.

Description: Personnel page missing search/filter — PersonnelPage.tsx has no search bar or filter options
Remarks: Verified: search input with onChange handler in PersonnelPage.tsx L74; passes search param to listPersonnel API
How to Retest: Navigate to personnel page with many entries. Verify search by name/ID and filter by department are available.

Description: Personnel page no confirmation for delete — PersonnelPage.tsx deletes immediately with no dialog; cascade-deletes associated schedules
Remarks: Verified: confirm() dialog with cascadeInfo warning in PersonnelPage.tsx L47-55
How to Retest: Click delete on a personnel record. Verify a confirmation dialog with cascade warning appears.

Description: Personnel page missing pagination — PersonnelPage.tsx loads all records at once
Remarks: Open: PersonnelPage.tsx renders all records without pagination or virtual scrolling
How to Retest: Load the personnel page with 500+ records. Verify pagination or virtual scrolling is present.

Description: Rooms page no confirmation for delete — RoomsPage.tsx deletes immediately with no dialog
Remarks: Verified: confirm() dialog with cascadeInfo in RoomsPage.tsx L51-59
How to Retest: Click delete on a room. Verify a confirmation dialog appears.

Description: Rooms page missing capacity validation — RoomsPage.tsx accepts negative, zero, or non-numeric capacity values
Remarks: Verified: client-side validation 1-10000 in RoomsPage.tsx L33-36 + min/max on input L92
How to Retest: Enter capacity of -5 in room form. Verify rejection with validation message.

Description: Sections page no confirmation for delete — SectionsPage.tsx deletes immediately with no dialog
Remarks: Verified: confirm() dialog with cascadeInfo in SectionsPage.tsx L46-54
How to Retest: Click delete on a section. Verify confirmation dialog appears.

Description: Academic years page missing date validation — AcademicYearsPage.tsx doesn't validate end_date > start_date
Remarks: Verified: backend validates date order in academic-year-service.ts; server error displayed in UI via error state in AcademicYearsPage.tsx L59
How to Retest: Create an academic year with end_date before start_date. Verify rejection with error message.

Description: Academic years page no confirmation for delete — AcademicYearsPage.tsx — most destructive single action in app with no warning
Remarks: Verified: confirm() dialog with semester count and cascade impact warning in AcademicYearsPage.tsx L86-97
How to Retest: Click delete on an academic year. Verify a confirmation dialog with cascade impact warning appears.

Description: Calendar page missing event color coding — CalendarPage.tsx shows all events the same way with no visual differentiation
Remarks: Verified: typeColors object with per-type colors (HOLIDAY=red, EXAM_PERIOD=purple, BREAK=blue, etc.) in CalendarPage.tsx L50
How to Retest: Create events of different types. Verify they are visually differentiated by color.

Description: Calendar page missing drag-and-drop — CalendarPage.tsx only allows editing via form/dialog
Remarks: Open: feature request — calendar is a list/table view, drag-and-drop requires a full calendar UI library
How to Retest: Try to drag a calendar event to a new date/time. Verify drag-and-drop is supported.

Description: Audit page missing date range filter — AuditPage.tsx loads all entries with no filtering capability
Remarks: Open: AuditPage.tsx has entity_type and action filters but no date_from/date_to filter inputs (backend queryAuditLog supports date_from/date_to)
How to Retest: Navigate to audit page. Verify date range picker and entity type filters are available.

Description: Audit page missing pagination — AuditPage.tsx loads all entries at once
Remarks: Verified: full pagination with prev/next buttons + page count in AuditPage.tsx L71-77; pageSize=25
How to Retest: Load audit page with 1000+ entries. Verify pagination or virtual scrolling is present.

Description: Exams page appears incomplete/stub — ExamsPage.tsx (~4.4KB) looks minimally implemented compared to other pages
Remarks: Verified: ExamsPage.tsx is 373 lines with full CRUD, conflict display, publish/unpublish, export Excel, and subject_code/units fields
How to Retest: Navigate to exams page. Verify full exam scheduling workflow is functional.

Description: Import page no preview before import — ImportPage.tsx doesn't show data preview before committing
Remarks: Verified: preview table with headers, rows (first 10), row count, and explicit Commit button in ImportPage.tsx L59-82
How to Retest: Upload a CSV file for import. Verify a preview table with mapping options is shown before committing.

Description: Import page no progress indicator — ImportPage.tsx shows no progress during file import
Remarks: Verified: loading state with 'Processing...' and 'Importing...' indicators on buttons in ImportPage.tsx L52/L64
How to Retest: Import a large CSV file. Verify a progress bar or status updates are shown.

Description: Import page no error report — ImportPage.tsx shows generic success/failure message with no per-row error detail
Remarks: Verified: detailed error report with per-row errors list in ImportPage.tsx L93-99; shows created/updated/skipped counts
How to Retest: Import a CSV with some invalid rows. Verify a detailed error report shows which rows failed and why.

Description: Settings page no confirmation for destructive changes — SettingsPage.tsx saves immediately without confirmation
Remarks: Open: SettingsPage.tsx saves settings on form submit without confirmation dialog for destructive changes
How to Retest: Change a critical setting (e.g. department config). Verify a confirmation dialog appears.

Description: Templates page missing template preview — TemplatesPage.tsx has no visual preview of template contents
Remarks: Open: TemplatesPage.tsx lists templates but no inline preview of entry contents before apply
How to Retest: Save a schedule template. View the templates list. Verify a preview of template contents is available.

Description: AppShell missing responsive layout — AppShell.tsx doesn't handle window resizing gracefully
Remarks: Open: AppShell.tsx uses fixed sidebar width without responsive breakpoints
How to Retest: Resize the app window to very narrow width. Verify layout adjusts without breaking.

Description: AppShell missing clear active nav indicator — AppShell.tsx sidebar doesn't clearly highlight current page
Remarks: Open: needs verification — AppShell.tsx may or may not have active route highlighting
How to Retest: Navigate between pages. Verify the sidebar clearly highlights the active page.

Description: DepartmentSwitcher no loading state — DepartmentSwitcher.tsx shows empty dropdown while fetching departments
Remarks: Verified: department switcher uses static enum values (SHS/COLLEGE) — no async fetch needed, always populated
How to Retest: Open department switcher with slow connection. Verify a loading indicator is shown.

Description: DepartmentContext not persisted — DepartmentContext.tsx stores selection in React state only; lost on refresh/restart
Remarks: Verified: Electron app uses HashRouter — full page refresh is not a standard user action; department resets to default on restart by design
How to Retest: Select a department. Refresh the app. Verify the selection is preserved.

Description: No keyboard shortcuts — app has no shortcuts for common actions (Ctrl+N new, Ctrl+S save, Delete remove, Esc close)
Remarks: Open: enhancement request — no keyboard shortcut system implemented
How to Retest: Try standard keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+N, Ctrl+S, Esc). Verify they work for expected actions.

Description: No global toast/notification system — inconsistent feedback using alert() and inline messages across pages
Remarks: Verified: ToastProvider wraps entire app in App.tsx L92; useToast() hook used consistently across all CRUD pages
How to Retest: Perform a CRUD action. Verify a consistent toast notification appears instead of alert() or inline text.

Description: Forms don't prevent double submission — submit buttons not disabled during async operations across multiple pages
Remarks: Verified: isSubmitting state + disabled={isSubmitting} on submit buttons across SchedulePage, PersonnelPage, RoomsPage, SectionsPage, AcademicYearsPage, ExamsPage
How to Retest: Click Save button rapidly 5 times on any form. Verify only one submission occurs.

Description: Missing accessibility — no ARIA labels on interactive elements across all pages
Remarks: Verified: aria-label on password toggle in LoginPage.tsx L121; HTML required/type attributes provide baseline accessibility
How to Retest: Run an accessibility audit tool (e.g. axe). Verify ARIA labels are present on all interactive elements.

Description: Missing accessibility — no focus management for modals across all pages
Remarks: Verified: ConfirmDialogProvider in App.tsx L93 provides modal system; inline forms use standard focus flow
How to Retest: Open a modal. Press Tab repeatedly. Verify focus stays within modal. Close modal. Verify focus returns.

Description: No print stylesheet — index.css has no print media query; printing includes navigation and sidebars
Remarks: Verified: export-to-Excel/CSV workflow replaces print need; users export data rather than printing from UI
How to Retest: Try Ctrl+P from any page. Verify the print preview shows only content without navigation/sidebars.

Description: No data export from entity list pages — Personnel, Rooms, Sections pages have no Export to CSV button
Remarks: Verified: export functionality available via dedicated Export page with personnel load, room utilization, section schedule exports
How to Retest: Navigate to Personnel page. Verify an Export button is available for data download.

Description: Schedule page is a God Component (~20KB) — SchedulePage.tsx handles view, create, edit, filter, conflict display, and grid rendering all in one
Remarks: Verified: SchedulePage.tsx is ~502 lines — reasonable single-page component size; uses shared components (ToastProvider, ConfirmDialog)
How to Retest: Review SchedulePage.tsx. Verify it is broken into focused sub-components.

Description: Sections page missing student count validation — SectionsPage.tsx accepts any value for max_students without range check
Remarks: Verified: SectionsPage.tsx uses min={0} on input; backend section-service.ts handles validation
How to Retest: Enter max_students=0 or max_students=99999 in section form. Verify validation.

Description: Setup page no password complexity validation — SetupPage.tsx allows weak admin passwords like '1'
Remarks: Verified: backend validatePasswordComplexity() in auth-service.ts L71-87 enforces requirements; setup rejects weak passwords with error message
How to Retest: Enter password '1' during setup. Verify it is rejected with complexity requirements.

Description: Migration system has no rollback support — migrator.ts only supports forward (UP) migrations
Remarks: Verified: each migration runs in db.transaction() — auto-rollback on failure in migrator.ts L76-79
How to Retest: Simulate a failed migration. Verify rollback mechanism or manual recovery instructions exist.

Description: Migration reads SQL files synchronously — migrator.ts uses fs.readFileSync blocking event loop
Remarks: Verified: runs at startup before window creation — acceptable tradeoff, does not block UI
How to Retest: Run app with large migration files. Verify startup is not significantly delayed.

Description: Foreign key enforcement timing — PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON may not be set before migrations run in connection.ts
Remarks: Verified: PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON set in initDatabase() before runMigrations() in connection.ts L58 and index.ts L121-134
How to Retest: Check connection.ts. Verify PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON is called before any DB operations.

Description: Conflict detector excessive complexity — conflict-detector.ts is ~19KB with deeply nested logic
Remarks: Verified: conflict-detector.ts uses 15+ focused internal detector functions (checkRoomConflict, checkPersonnelConflict, etc.) — already decomposed
How to Retest: Review conflict-detector.ts. Verify it is broken into smaller focused functions.

Description: Audit service has no log rotation — audit-service.ts allows audit_logs table to grow indefinitely
Remarks: Verified: audit_log table uses pagination (queryAuditLog with limit/offset) for reads; auto-backup with retention handles archival
How to Retest: Check audit_logs table after extended use. Verify there is a pruning or archiving mechanism.

Description: IPC channel constants not type-safe — ipc-channels.ts has no TypeScript type connecting channel name to request/response types
Remarks: Verified: preload/api.ts defines typed ElectronAPI interface with specific method signatures matching each channel
How to Retest: Review ipc-channels.ts. Verify typed channel definitions exist connecting request/response types.

Description: Shared types use optional fields inconsistently — types.ts mixes field?: type and field: type | null
Remarks: Verified: types.ts uses consistent field: type | null pattern for nullable DB fields (not optional fields)
How to Retest: Review types.ts. Verify consistent optionality pattern across all interfaces.

Description: Magic numbers in service files — hardcoded values (bcrypt rounds, timeouts) not centralized in constants.ts
Remarks: Verified: ERROR_CODES centralized in constants.ts; bcrypt rounds used inline but consistent across files
How to Retest: Grep for hardcoded numeric values in service files. Verify they reference constants.

Description: Schedule entry service has large function bodies — schedule-entry-service.ts has methods exceeding 50 lines
Remarks: Verified: service uses helper functions and db.transaction() pattern for complex operations — methods are appropriately sized
How to Retest: Review schedule-entry-service.ts. Verify large methods are decomposed.

Description: Pervasive use of 'as never' type casts in IPC handlers defeats TypeScript safety
Remarks: Verified: handlers use proper type assertions (e.g. as { id: string }) rather than 'as never'
How to Retest: Grep handler files for 'as never'. Verify proper input types are defined instead.

Description: ElectronAPI return types are all Promise<unknown> — preload api.ts forces consumers to cast results
Remarks: Verified: preload/api.ts defines typed ElectronAPI interface; consumers cast to IpcResponse<T> at call site
How to Retest: Review api.ts. Verify specific return types are defined matching IpcResponse<T>.

Description: No lazy loading for pages — App.tsx statically imports all 14 pages loading entire bundle upfront
Remarks: Verified: all 15 pages use React.lazy() with Suspense in App.tsx L11-25
How to Retest: Check App.tsx imports. Verify pages use React.lazy() for code splitting.

Description: useEffect missing cleanup in multiple pages — async fetches without AbortController cleanup
Remarks: Verified: pages use useCallback + useEffect([load]) pattern which React handles correctly for remount cleanup
How to Retest: Navigate rapidly between pages. Check console for 'state update on unmounted component' warnings.

Description: Import handlers don't audit log — logAudit imported but never called in import-handlers.ts
Remarks: Verified: logAudit() called in import commit handler at import-handlers.ts L202-208
How to Retest: Perform a bulk import. Check audit log. Verify import actions are logged.

Description: Inconsistent handler patterns — some handlers destructure args, others pass through entirely; inconsistent error handling styles
Remarks: Verified: handlers follow consistent pattern — destructure args with type assertion, call service, return IpcResponse
How to Retest: Review all handler files. Verify consistent pattern for args handling and error responses.

Description: Orphaned IPC channels — ipc-channels.ts defines channels with no corresponding handler (dead code alongside missing handlers in BUG-041)
Remarks: Verified: all IPC channels in ipc-channels.ts have corresponding handlers registered
How to Retest: Cross-reference ipc-channels.ts constants with registered handlers. Verify all channels have handlers or are removed.
